title: Zhaoxin / VIA x86 Platform Stack
body:
# Zhaoxin / VIA x86 Platform Stack

**Platform stack:** `pc_zhaoxin_kx` · **Era:** 1999–2026 · **Vendor:** Zhaoxin / VIA · **Count:** 8

Centaur/VIA C3/C7 lineage (**1999–2013**) through Zhaoxin **KX-6000 (16nm, 2018)** and **KX-7000 (DDR5/PCIe5, 2022+)** — domestic x86 with CHX003 I/O hub.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: pc_zhaoxin_kx` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **Zhaoxin KX-6000 MCH** (Zhaoxin, 64-bit) — KX-6000 memory controller hub — VIA-derived x86 domestic
- **Zhaoxin KX-7000 MCH** (Zhaoxin, 64-bit) — KX-7000 DDR5/PCIe5 north — Zhaoxin 7-series
- **Zhaoxin CHX003 I/O Hub** (Zhaoxin, 64-bit) — CHX003 south — SATA USB LPC for KX platforms
- **VIA VT8237 Southbridge** (VIA, 32-bit) — VIA lineage south — IDE SATA USB2 — KX/C7 path
- **VIA CN400 Northbridge** (VIA, 32-bit) — C3/C7 integrated graphics north — Centaur heritage
- **Zhaoxin IOAPIC Glue** (Zhaoxin, 64-bit) — APIC/IOAPIC interrupt steering — KX platform glue
- **VIA Centaur FSB Bridge** (VIA, 64-bit) — Front-side bus + QPI-like link — VIA→Zhaoxin lineage

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **8** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: pc_zhaoxin_kx · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
